# edgepush

> Open-source push notification API for iOS and Android, running on Cloudflare Workers. Bring your own APNs and FCM credentials, send from one endpoint, own your delivery data.

edgepush is a developer-first push notification service. The server is AGPL-3.0, the SDK and CLI are MIT. Free hosted tier on edgepush.dev or self-host on your own Cloudflare account with two wrangler deploys.

## Product

- [Home](https://edgepush.dev/): Overview, quickstart, comparison vs Expo Push, OneSignal, Knock.
- [Pricing](https://edgepush.dev/pricing): Free ($0, 10K events/month), Pro ($29, 50K events/month), Self-host ($0, unlimited).
- [Self-host](https://edgepush.dev/selfhost): Deploy the full stack to your own Cloudflare account.
- [Sign in](https://app.edgepush.dev/sign-in): GitHub OAuth to the dashboard.

## Documentation

- [Docs index](https://edgepush.dev/docs): Full reference for SDK, CLI, REST API, webhooks, error codes.
- [Quickstart](https://edgepush.dev/docs/quickstart): Send your first push in under five minutes.
- [Credentials](https://edgepush.dev/docs/credentials): APNs .p8 key and Firebase service account JSON setup.
- [Send API](https://edgepush.dev/docs/send): POST /v1/send reference and payload schema.
- [SDK](https://edgepush.dev/docs/sdk): @edgepush/sdk for Node, Bun, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, React Native.
- [CLI](https://edgepush.dev/docs/cli): @edgepush/cli for local testing and token management.
- [Webhooks](https://edgepush.dev/docs/webhooks): HMAC-signed delivery receipts for delivered, retry, failed, invalid_token.
- [Rate limits](https://edgepush.dev/docs/rate-limits): Per-app token bucket via Durable Objects.
- [Errors](https://edgepush.dev/docs/errors): Full error code table.
- [Self-host](https://edgepush.dev/docs/self-host): Deploy to your own Cloudflare account.

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/akshitkrnagpal/edgepush): Server (AGPL-3.0), SDK and CLI (MIT).
- [@edgepush/sdk on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@edgepush/sdk)
- [@edgepush/cli on npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@edgepush/cli)
- [Releases](https://github.com/akshitkrnagpal/edgepush/releases)

## Legal

- [Privacy](https://edgepush.dev/legal/privacy)
- [Terms](https://edgepush.dev/legal/terms)
